title.en: VHT PHY Clause 21 Remainder: SU/MU Beamforming & Sounding PHY, VHT Spectral Mask / EVM, Receiver Limits, and the Transmit/Receive Procedures
title.zh: VHT 物理层第 21 章余部:SU/MU 波束成形与探测物理层、VHT 频谱模板/EVM、接收机限值,以及收发流程

blocks.en: By now you've met the heart of the VHT (802.11ac) PHY — its OFDM symbols, preamble fields, and MCS tables. This lesson sweeps up the uncovered tail of Clause 21: how a multi-antenna transmitter steers energy (beamforming and sounding), the housekeeping clauses (regulatory, channelization, slot time, port impedance), the bench-test rulebook that says when a radio is 'good enough' to transmit and receive, and finally the two state machines that actually drive a packet out the antenna and pull one back in. Think of it as the radio's spec sheet plus its operating instructions.
blocks.zh: 到目前为止,你已经接触了 VHT(802.11ac)物理层的核心——它的 OFDM 符号、前导字段和 MCS 速率表。本课收尾 Clause 21 尚未覆盖的部分:多天线发射机如何把能量定向(波束成形与信道探测)、那些“家务事”条款(法规、信道划分、时隙时间、端口阻抗)、规定一台收发机“合格”与否的测试规则手册,以及最后真正把一个数据包推出天线、又把一个包接回来的两台状态机。可以把它看作这部电台的“规格书”加“操作说明书”。

blocks.en: Start with beamforming (21.3.11). A transmitter with several antennas — the beamformer — can shape its signal so it lands strongest where the receiver is. In SU-MIMO all the streams go to one station; in downlink MU-MIMO disjoint subsets of streams go to different stations at once. To do this the beamformer needs to know the channel, so it sends a sounding packet and the beamformee replies with a feedback matrix V, compressed as angles (φ, ψ) so it fits in a frame. The beamformer reconstructs V and computes a steering matrix Q — and crucially the standard leaves how Q is computed up to the implementation. 21.3.11.3 caps the total space-time streams an MU PPDU may carry, and 21.3.11.4 ties each MU recipient to its streams via the Group ID field carried in VHT-SIG-A.
blocks.zh: 先看波束成形(21.3.11)。一台拥有多根天线的发射机——即“波束成形器(beamformer)”——可以塑形信号,让能量在接收机所在方向最强。在 SU-MIMO 中,所有空时流都发给单个站点;在下行 MU-MIMO 中,互不相交的若干流子集同时发给不同站点。要做到这点,波束成形器需要知道信道,于是它发送一个探测包,被成形方(beamformee)回以反馈矩阵 V——以角度(φ、ψ)压缩,以便塞进一帧。波束成形器据此重建 V 并算出导向矩阵 Q;关键在于:标准把 Q 的具体算法留给实现自行决定。21.3.11.3 对一个 MU PPDU 可承载的空时流总数设上限;21.3.11.4 则通过 VHT-SIG-A 中的 Group ID 字段把每个 MU 接收者与它的流对应起来。

blocks.en: Sounding (21.3.12) is deliberately minimal: the only VHT sounding format is the NDP (Null Data Packet) — it reuses the full VHT preamble but carries no Data field. It exists purely to let the beamformee measure the channel and send back V. No payload, no waste.
blocks.zh: 信道探测(21.3.12)刻意做得极简:VHT 唯一的探测格式就是 NDP(空数据包,Null Data Packet)——它沿用完整的 VHT 前导,但不带 Data 字段。它存在的唯一目的,就是让被成形方测量信道并回送 V。没有载荷,毫不浪费。

blocks.en: Several short clauses set the radio's ground rules. Regulatory requirements (21.3.13) defer to each country's rules and only specify what affects interoperability. Channelization (21.3.14) maps MIB fields like dot11CurrentChannelCenterFrequencyIndex0/1 to actual center frequencies — including the 80+80 MHz case with two separate frequency segments. Slot time (21.3.15) is a flat 9 µs across all widths. And transmit/receive port impedance (21.3.16) simply points back to the Clause 17 antenna-connector definition. These are the un-glamorous parameters that let independently built radios agree on the same air.
blocks.zh: 几条简短的条款为这部电台定下基本规矩。法规要求(21.3.13)服从各国规定,只规定影响互操作性的内容。信道划分(21.3.14)把诸如 dot11CurrentChannelCenterFrequencyIndex0/1 这样的 MIB 字段映射到实际的中心频率——包括 80+80 MHz 这种带两个独立频段的情形。时隙时间(21.3.15)在所有带宽下统一为 9 µs。收发端口阻抗(21.3.16)则直接指回 Clause 17 的天线连接器定义。这些都是不起眼的参数,却让各自独立设计的电台能在同一片空中达成一致。

blocks.en: Now the conformance rulebook. The transmit specification (21.3.17) bounds what a 'clean' transmitter may emit: a spectral mask (21.3.17.1) shaped per bandwidth (20/40/80/160/80+80 MHz) so you don't splatter into neighbours; spectral flatness (21.3.17.2) so no subcarrier is too loud or soft; center-frequency and symbol-clock tolerance (21.3.17.3) of ±20 ppm from a shared reference oscillator; modulation accuracy / EVM (21.3.17.4) where the relative constellation error must beat a per-MCS limit (e.g. −32 dB for 256-QAM 5/6); and Time-of-Departure accuracy (21.3.17.5) of ≤80 ns RMS, which underpins ranging. The receiver specification (21.3.18) mirrors this from the other end: minimum sensitivity (21.3.18.1), adjacent and nonadjacent channel rejection (21.3.18.2–3), a maximum input of −30 dBm before it must still work (21.3.18.4), CCA sensitivity thresholds per primary/secondary subchannel (21.3.18.5), and the RSSI (21.3.18.6) and RCPI (21.3.18.7) power-report definitions.
blocks.zh: 接下来是合规规则手册。发射规范(21.3.17)界定一台“干净”的发射机可以发出什么:按带宽(20/40/80/160/80+80 MHz)成形的频谱模板(21.3.17.1),让你不致溢出干扰邻道;频谱平坦度(21.3.17.2),使任一子载波不会过强或过弱;中心频率与符号时钟容差(21.3.17.3)为 ±20 ppm,且须取自同一参考振荡器;调制精度/EVM(21.3.17.4),其相对星座误差须优于每种 MCS 的限值(例如 256-QAM 5/6 须达 −32 dB);以及离开时间(Time of Departure)精度(21.3.17.5)须 ≤80 ns 均方根,这是测距的基础。接收规范(21.3.18)从另一端对应映射:最小灵敏度(21.3.18.1)、邻道与非邻道抑制(21.3.18.2–3)、在 −30 dBm 最大输入下仍须工作(21.3.18.4)、按主/辅子信道划分的 CCA 灵敏度门限(21.3.18.5),以及 RSSI(21.3.18.6)与 RCPI(21.3.18.7)这两种功率报告的定义。

blocks.en: A handy intuition: sensitivity numbers worsen as you widen the channel — BPSK 1/2 is −82 dBm at 20 MHz but only −73 dBm at 160 MHz. Spread the same energy over four times the bandwidth and each part is weaker, so the receiver needs a stronger signal to hear it. The mask and EVM limits then say 'and don't be sloppy while you transmit it.'
blocks.zh: 一个好用的直觉:信道越宽,灵敏度数值越差——BPSK 1/2 在 20 MHz 是 −82 dBm,而在 160 MHz 只有 −73 dBm。把同样的能量摊到四倍的带宽上,每一份就更弱,接收机因此需要更强的信号才听得见。频谱模板与 EVM 限值则补上一句:“而且发的时候别马虎。”

blocks.en:
flowchart TD
    A[PHY-TXSTART.request TXVECTOR] --> B[Initialize, set TX params]
    B --> C[TX L-Preamble: L-STF, L-LTF, L-SIG]
    C --> D[TX VHT-Preamble: VHT-SIG-A, VHT-STF, VHT-LTFs, VHT-SIG-B]
    D --> E[PHY-TXSTART.confirm, set symbol count = NSYM]
    E --> F{symbol count > 0?}
    F -- yes --> G[TX PSDU octet: scramble, encode, buffer symbol]
    G --> F
    F -- no --> H[Padding & tail bits]
    H --> I[Switch to RX state]
    F -. PHY-TXEND.request any stage .-> I
blocks.zh:
flowchart TD
    A[PHY-TXSTART.request TXVECTOR] --> B[初始化,设置发送参数]
    B --> C[发 L 前导:L-STF、L-LTF、L-SIG]
    C --> D[发 VHT 前导:VHT-SIG-A、VHT-STF、VHT-LTFs、VHT-SIG-B]
    D --> E[PHY-TXSTART.confirm,符号计数 = NSYM]
    E --> F{符号计数 > 0?}
    F -- 是 --> G[发 PSDU 字节:加扰、编码、缓冲一个符号]
    G --> F
    F -- 否 --> H[填充位与尾比特]
    H --> I[切换到接收状态]
    F -. 任意阶段收到 PHY-TXEND.request .-> I

blocks.en: Finally the two procedures. The transmit procedure (21.3.19) is the choreography above: the MAC issues PHY-TXSTART.request, the PHY sends the legacy then VHT preamble, scrambles and encodes the PSDU symbol by symbol, appends 0–7 padding bits plus tail, and switches to receive when done — and a PHY-TXEND.request can cut it short at any stage. The receive procedure (21.3.20) is the mirror: on energy in the primary channel the PHY raises PHY-CCA.indication(BUSY), checks L-SIG parity and rate, evaluates VHT-SIG-A for a supported mode, optionally decodes VHT-SIG-B (mandatory for an MU beamformee), may filter the PPDU out by Group ID / Partial AID, then hands decoded octets up via PHY-DATA.indication and ends with PHY-RXEND.indication(NoError). Format violations, unsupported rates, and carrier-loss each have their own error indication.
blocks.zh: 最后是两套流程。发送流程(21.3.19)就是上面那段“编舞”:MAC 发出 PHY-TXSTART.request,物理层先发传统前导再发 VHT 前导,逐个符号地对 PSDU 加扰、编码,追加 0–7 个填充位加尾比特,完成后切换到接收;而 PHY-TXEND.request 可在任意阶段将其提前终止。接收流程(21.3.20)则是镜像:当主信道上出现能量,物理层发出 PHY-CCA.indication(BUSY),检查 L-SIG 的奇偶校验与速率,评估 VHT-SIG-A 是否为受支持模式,可选地解码 VHT-SIG-B(对 MU 被成形方为必做),可依据 Group ID / Partial AID 把该 PPDU 滤除,然后通过 PHY-DATA.indication 把解码后的字节上交,最终以 PHY-RXEND.indication(NoError) 收尾。格式违规、不支持的速率、载波丢失各自对应一种错误指示。

summary.en: How the receiver decides a VHT PPDU vs HT vs non-HT — the QBPSK trick
summary.zh: 接收机如何区分 VHT、HT 与非 HT —— QBPSK 这一招

blocks.en: Inside 21.3.20, the PHY must tell three preamble families apart with no explicit 'this is VHT' flag in L-SIG. The rule: after a valid L-SIG (parity OK, RATE = 6 Mb/s, length implying ≥6 OFDM symbols), it inspects the modulation of the symbols following L-LTF. If the first OFDM symbol after L-LTF is BPSK it issues PHY-RXEARLYSIG.indication; the discriminator is then the third symbol — VHT marks VHT-SIG-A by rotating its second symbol to QBPSK (the constellation is rotated 90°), whereas HT-greenfield/mixed and non-HT use different patterns. Concretely, the first two symbols after L-LTF in BPSK and the third in QBPSK signals a VHT PPDU. On a supported VHT-SIG-A the PHY commits to holding CCA busy for RXTIME and reads VHT-SIG-A's Group ID: a VHT SU value lets it skip VHT-SIG-B decoding, while a VHT MU value (1–62) forces an MU-beamformee-capable STA to decode VHT-SIG-B and, via MembershipStatusInGroupID and the MU[u] NSTS fields, learn how many streams (if any) are its own. A Reserved VHT-SIG-A indication, a CRC failure, or an L-SIG Length not divisible by 3 each yield PHY-RXEND.indication(FormatViolation).
blocks.zh: 在 21.3.20 内部,物理层必须在 L-SIG 里没有任何显式“这是 VHT”标志的情况下,把三种前导家族区分开。规则是:在 L-SIG 有效(奇偶正确、RATE = 6 Mb/s、长度意味着 ≥6 个 OFDM 符号)之后,它检查 L-LTF 之后各符号的调制方式。若 L-LTF 之后的第一个 OFDM 符号是 BPSK,便发出 PHY-RXEARLYSIG.indication;真正的判别依据是第三个符号——VHT 通过把它的第二个符号旋转为 QBPSK(星座旋转 90°)来标记 VHT-SIG-A,而 HT-greenfield/mixed 与非 HT 使用不同的模式。具体而言:L-LTF 之后头两个符号为 BPSK、第三个符号为 QBPSK,即标示这是一个 VHT PPDU。在收到受支持的 VHT-SIG-A 后,物理层承诺在 RXTIME 期间保持 CCA 忙,并读取 VHT-SIG-A 的 Group ID:VHT SU 值允许它跳过 VHT-SIG-B 解码,而 VHT MU 值(1–62)则强制一个具备 MU 被成形能力的 STA 解码 VHT-SIG-B,并经由 MembershipStatusInGroupID 与 MU[u] NSTS 字段,得知有多少流(若有的话)属于自己。保留的 VHT-SIG-A 指示、CRC 失败,或 L-SIG Length 不能被 3 整除,各自都会产生 PHY-RXEND.indication(FormatViolation)。

cites.note: 21.3.11 SU/MU-MIMO beamforming (V matrix, max total STS, Group ID) and 21.3.12 VHT NDP sounding format
21.3.13 regulatory, 21.3.14 channelization, 21.3.15 slot time (9 us), 21.3.16 port impedance
21.3.17 VHT transmit spec: spectral mask, flatness, +/-20 ppm tolerance, EVM/constellation error, 80 ns ToD accuracy
21.3.18 VHT receiver spec: sensitivity table, adjacent/nonadjacent rejection, -30 dBm max input, CCA thresholds, RSSI, RCPI
21.3.19 PHY transmit procedure/state machine and 21.3.20 PHY receive procedure/state machine
